mission: Set up your environment, understand the BootXamp rhythm, and complete your first micro-tasks across all four departments.
managerBrief: Welcome to BootXamp. Day 1 is about calibration, not volume. Finish small, finish clean, and build the habit of submitting a complete day.

departments.name: Learn
departments.description: Study, courses, notes, and structured practice.

tasks.title: Watch BootXamp onboarding video
tasks.description: Understand the weekly rhythm, daily submission flow, and promotion system.

tasks.title: Read the engineering handbook chapter 1
tasks.description: skim the coding standards, git workflow, and review checklist.

tasks.title: Take notes on 3 key takeaways
tasks.description: Write a short summary of the most important rules you learned today.

tasks.title: Set up local development environment
tasks.description: Install dependencies, run the dev server, and confirm the app builds.

tasks.title: Create your first commit
tasks.description: Make a small, meaningful change and commit it with a conventional message.

tasks.title: Write a 150-word reflection
tasks.description: What do you want to achieve in the next 7 weeks? Be specific.

tasks.title: Read one technical article
tasks.description: Pick an article relevant to your stack and note one thing you can apply.

tasks.title: Update LinkedIn headline
tasks.description: Make it clear what you do and what you are becoming.

tasks.title: Identify 5 target companies
tasks.description: List companies you would want to work with and why.
